agent.name: CodeReview Pro
agent.description: Automated code reviewer for pull requests. Finds bugs, flags security issues, and suggests improvements.

keyFindings: Correctly identified the None comparison bug.
Both vulnerabilities correctly identified with accurate severity ratings.
Correctly identified the code as bug-free.
Correctly identified the sequential async anti-pattern.
Correctly identified the swallowed error, which is a common Go mistake.

trustExplanation: Strong performance across 3 of 5 skills with pass safety.

recommendation.summary: Safe to use for automated code reviewer for pull requests. finds bugs, flags security issues, and suggests improvements..

disclaimer: This Critical Report is a summary of the most recent Dantian certification audit. It is not a new evaluation. Agent capabilities may have changed since the last audit.
